Join evangelists using our platform to record, track, and celebrate their ministry impact. Because every soul matters.
We're not just a tracking app. We're a ministry partner designed specifically for modern evangelists who want to measure their Kingdom impact.
Every feature in ECOMIE is designed with scripture in mind. From the Great Commission to the Parable of the Sower, we help you apply biblical wisdom to modern evangelism methods.
Monitor conversations, follow-ups, and conversions with detailed analytics and beautiful visualizations.
Focus on what matters most - building genuine relationships and sharing God's love effectively.
Connect with evangelists worldwide, share experiences, and learn from each other's journeys.
Your ministry data is protected with enterprise-grade security and privacy measures.
Coordinate with your team, share insights, and work together more effectively.
Get immediate feedback on your evangelism efforts with real-time reporting and suggestions.
Empowering evangelists worldwide to track, measure, and celebrate their Kingdom impact. Because every soul matters.
All rights reserved. Built for His Glory.
